overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a neon-lit night market inspired by Japanese street food culture. The scene features wet pavement reflecting vibrant cyan, pink, and red neon lights from various food stalls, with red paper lanterns strung overhead and vendors attending their counters.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered night market walkway with food stalls

events.description: passing pedestrian in pink jacket standing near advertisement poster
approaching food stall with customer seated on green illuminated stool

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the night market past neon-lit food stalls and red paper lanterns

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink jacket standing and looking at a large illuminated poster
customer sitting on green stool at food counter

entered.detail: wooden food stall with circular menu displays on top and vendor visible inside
large illuminated pink advertisement poster featuring a woman's face
string of red Japanese paper lanterns hanging overhead along the walkway
open-air food counter with bright green stools and cooking equipment

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered night market passage with wet tiled ground reflecting neon lights. A food stall with circular displays sits on the left while a pedestrian in pink stands near a large pink advertisement on the right. Red paper lanterns hang overhead as the character approaches another stall with green stools where a customer is seated.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market corridor with cyan-lit food stall

events.description: arriving at and stopping briefly at the cyan-lit food stall
exiting the bright stall area into a darker corridor section

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing the blue-lit food stall before continuing through a darker passage

notable_agents.action: vendor in white tank top working behind the counter preparing food

entered.detail: food stall illuminated with bright cyan-blue lighting and green stools in front
green metal support beams and ladders attached to the building

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a distinct food stall bathed in cyan-blue light with a vendor working inside. After observing the stall, the character moves past it into a darker, narrower corridor with metal scaffolding visible on the left, transitioning away from the initial market section.

scene_state.functional_zone: open night market plaza with multiple vendors

events.description: emerging from dark corridor into brighter open market area with multiple stalls
passing under illuminated cherry blossom tree with pink-purple lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the bustling market plaza passing various food vendors and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking alongside the character
customer standing at food stall counter ordering food

entered.detail: tree with pink-purple illuminated blossoms providing ambient lighting
rustic wooden stall with various items and boxes on display
bright red illuminated vending machine or kiosk

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark corridor, the scene opens into a wider market plaza with moderate foot traffic. An illuminated cherry blossom tree with pink-purple lights stands on the left while various food stalls line both sides. Red paper lanterns hang densely overhead as the character navigates through pedestrians and vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market walkway with food stalls

events.description: approaching food stall with illuminated glass display case
approaching stall with prominent purple neon lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing through the market past various food vendors with different colored lighting

notable_agents.action: vendor behind counter attending to food display case

entered.detail: food stall with glass display case showing pastries or prepared food items under warm lighting
food stall with prominent purple neon lighting and digital menu displays
illuminated digital screen showing menu items and prices

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the narrower market walkway, approaching a stall with a glass food display case where a vendor is working. Further along, another stall features prominent purple neon lighting. The wet pavement continues to reflect the various colored lights as the character moves deeper into the market.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit night market that transitions from a covered passage into a dark corridor before opening into a vibrant plaza. It begins by gliding past food stalls and red paper lanterns over wet tiled ground, moving past a pedestrian beside a large pink advertisement toward a customer seated on green stools. As the camera approaches a stall bathed in cyan-blue light, the scene shifts into a darker, narrower corridor flanked by metal scaffolding. The view then expands as the character emerges from the shadows into a wider market plaza featuring an illuminated pink-purple cherry blossom tree and dense clusters of overhead lanterns. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into a narrower walkway, passing a glass food display and purple neon lighting that shimmer across the reflective pavement.
